About Subaru Error Codes

Subaru is a leading manufacturer of appliances and industrial equipment. When your Subaru appliance shows an error code, it indicates a specific issue that needs attention. Our comprehensive database includes error codes for all Subaru product categories including washers, dryers, refrigerators, dishwashers, HVAC systems, and more.

Each error code page provides detailed troubleshooting steps, common causes, and recommended solutions to help you fix the issue quickly.
